ConstitutionalityFor information regarding the constitutionality of part C of title X of , as added by , which was classified generally to this subchapter (sections 691 et seq. of this title), see the Table of Laws Held Unconstitutional in Whole or in Part by the Supreme Court on the Constitution Annotated website, constitution.congress.gov.Pub. Effective and Termination Dates, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–130, § 5110 Stat. 1212Apr. 9, 1996“This Act [enacting this subchapter and provisions set out as a note under and amending provisions set out as notes under ] and the amendments made by it shall take effect and apply to measures enacted on the earlier of—section 681 of this titlesection 621 of this title“(1)the day after the enactment into law, pursuant to Article I, section 7, of the Constitution of the United States, of an Act entitled ‘An Act to provide for a seven-year plan for deficit reduction and achieve a balanced Federal budget.’; or“(2);January 1, 1997and shall have no force or effect on or after .”January 1, 2005
